jobResponsibilities: Lead cross-functional teams of engineering, design, and data science to execute the product roadmap from ideation to launch
Define and track core product OKRs, iterating based on quantitative analytics and qualitative user feedback
Spearhead the successful launch of the new AI-driven recommendation engine, increasing user retention by 22%
Collaborate closely with C-level stakeholders to align product strategy with long-term business goals
Mentor and coach junior PMs, establishing best practices for sprint planning and product requirement docs (PRDs)
vision: I want to transition from leading individual high-impact product squads to defining the overarching product strategy for an entire business unit. My goal is to become a VP of Product within the next 3 years, building a culture of rapid experimentation, deep user empathy, and relentless execution.
targetRole:
VP of Product
- Set product vision and strategy for the entire portfolio.
- Build and scale a world-class product organization.
- Partner with the executive team to drive company-wide P&L outcomes.

strengths.details: Highly proficient in SQL and Amplitude. I rely on hard data rather than gut feeling to prioritize the roadmap, which led to a 15% increase in conversion last quarter.
Known for aligning engineering, design, and marketing teams under tight deadlines without formal authority.

growthAreas.details: I need to learn how to communicate complex product trade-offs succinctly to the Board of Directors and investors.
I excel at leading a squad, but managing multiple product managers and designing a scalable team structure is a new challenge.
Need to develop a deeper understanding of financial modeling, pricing strategy, and unit economics.

skills.name: Product Strategy & Vision
skills.gap: Moving from 1-year planning to 3-year strategic bets
skills.notes: Need to focus on market expansion and competitive moats.

skills.gap: Need to communicate efficiently at the C-suite/Board level
Need to tie product metrics directly to revenue and margin impact
skills.notes: Work closely with the VP of Finance to model the next big feature launch.

skills.gap: Need to know how to structure squads and tribes as we scale
Need to master enterprise pricing and sales enablement
skills.notes: Partner with PMM on the Q3 enterprise tier launch.

goals.title: Launch the AI Recommendation Engine to 100% of users
goals.notes: Successfully rolled out. Lifted retention by 22%.

goals.title: Design the 2027 Product Roadmap and secure Board approval
goals.notes: Drafting the strategic narrative. Need to align with Sales on key enterprise requests.

goals.title: Hire and onboard 2 new Senior Product Managers
goals.notes: Sourcing candidates. Interviewing 4 finalists this week.

goals.title: Complete an Executive Leadership Coaching program
goals.notes: Researching coaches. Budget approved by HR.

goals.title: Define and implement a new pricing model for the Enterprise tier
goals.notes: Analyzing competitor pricing and running elasticity tests.
